benefits.description: Recommends MK-677 anecdotally works better than GHRP-6 for weight gain results

protocol_notes: User recommends ditching most peptides except possibly Tesamorelin at full 2mg/day dose, then adding MK-677. States GHRP-6 is somewhat similar to MK-677 but has seen better anecdotal results with MK-677. Considers IGF-1 LR3 ineffective ('trash'). Suggests if serious results desired, use pharmaceutical GH instead.
